text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 51 

GAP_DAYS_INP_2M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Pharmacy — days in 2-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 2-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an in-
network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the coverage gap phase of 
the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_INP_2M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8
